revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

1 revision imported: importing jawiki history before translation, of all the 12 lunar months
Copying from [[Category:旧暦9月]] to [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月24日'''は、[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の24日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[慶長]]19年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1614年]][[10月27日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が[[高山右近]]ら[[キリシタン大名]]を含む148人を[[マニラ]]・[[マカオ]]に追放{{要出典|date=2021-04}} * [[明治]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1870年]][[10月18日]]） - 府県物産表に関する太政官布告が公布（[[統計の日]]の由来）
== 誕生日 == *[[龍徳 (五代後梁)|龍徳]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[921年]][[10月27日]]） - [[柴栄]]（世宗）、[[五代十国時代|五代]][[後周]]の2代皇帝（+ [[959年]]） *[[弘治 (明)|弘治]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1491年]][[10月26日]]）- [[正徳帝]]{{要出典|date=2021-04}}、第11代[[明]][[皇帝]]（+ [[1521年]]） * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1533年]][[10月12日]]） - [[朝倉義景]]<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景}}</ref>、[[戦国大名]]（+ [[1573年]]） * [[天保]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1837年]][[10月23日]]） - [[大倉喜八郎]]、[[実業家]]・[[大倉財閥]]創設（+ [[1928年]]） * [[嘉永]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1853年]][[10月26日]]） - [[徳川昭武]]、[[水戸藩]]主（+ [[1910年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛永]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1633年]][[10月26日]]） - [[堀尾忠晴]]、[[松江藩]]主（* [[1599年]]） * [[享保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1716年]][[11月7日]]） - [[有栖川宮正仁親王]]、[[有栖川宮]]第4代当主（* [[1694年]]） * 享保7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1722年]][[11月2日]]） - [[池西言水]]、[[俳人]]（* [[1650年]]） * 享保9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1724年]][[11月9日]]） - [[西川如見]]、[[天文学者]]（* [[1648年]]） * [[延享]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1744年]][[10月29日]]） - [[石田梅岩]]、[[思想家]]（* [[1685年]]） * [[安政]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1859年]][[11月14日]]） - [[佐藤一斎]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1772年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|23|9|25|8|24|10|9|0924}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月24日'''は、[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の24日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[慶長]]19年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1614年]][[10月27日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が[[高山右近]]ら[[キリシタン大名]]を含む148人を[[マニラ]]・[[マカオ]]に追放{{要出典|date=2021-04}} * [[明治]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1870年]][[10月18日]]） - 府県物産表に関する太政官布告が公布（[[統計の日]]の由来）
== 誕生日 == *[[龍徳 (五代後梁)|龍徳]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[921年]][[10月27日]]） - [[柴栄]]（世宗）、[[五代十国時代|五代]][[後周]]の2代皇帝（+ [[959年]]） *[[弘治 (明)|弘治]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1491年]][[10月26日]]）- [[正徳帝]]{{要出典|date=2021-04}}、第11代[[明]][[皇帝]]（+ [[1521年]]） * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1533年]][[10月12日]]） - [[朝倉義景]]<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景}}</ref>、[[戦国大名]]（+ [[1573年]]） * [[天保]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1837年]][[10月23日]]） - [[大倉喜八郎]]、[[実業家]]・[[大倉財閥]]創設（+ [[1928年]]） * [[嘉永]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1853年]][[10月26日]]） - [[徳川昭武]]、[[水戸藩]]主（+ [[1910年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛永]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1633年]][[10月26日]]） - [[堀尾忠晴]]、[[松江藩]]主（* [[1599年]]） * [[享保]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1716年]][[11月7日]]） - [[有栖川宮正仁親王]]、[[有栖川宮]]第4代当主（* [[1694年]]） * 享保7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1722年]][[11月2日]]） - [[池西言水]]、[[俳人]]（* [[1650年]]） * 享保9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1724年]][[11月9日]]） - [[西川如見]]、[[天文学者]]（* [[1648年]]） * [[延享]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1744年]][[10月29日]]） - [[石田梅岩]]、[[思想家]]（* [[1685年]]） * [[安政]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1859年]][[11月14日]]） - [[佐藤一斎]]、[[儒学者]]（* [[1772年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|23|9|25|8|24|10|9|0924}}

revision.text:
[[sn:September 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿四]] [[zh:九月廿四]] [[en:draft:September 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * Year 19 of {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}}, [[1614]]) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} banishes {{ill|Takayama Ukon|ja|高山右近}} and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名}} to {{ill|Manila|ja|マニラ}} and {{ill|Macau|ja|マカオ}}. * Year 3 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}}, [[1870]]) – The {{ill|Dajōkan|ja|太政官}} issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for {{ill|Statistics Day|ja|統計の日}}.
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}}, [[921]]) – {{ill|Chai Rong|ja|柴栄}}, known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of {{ill|Later Zhou|ja|後周}} (d. [[959]]). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|弘治 (明)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}}, [[1491]]) – The {{ill|Zhengde Emperor|ja|正徳帝}}, the 11th emperor of the {{ill|Ming dynasty|ja|明}} (d. [[1521]]). * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文 (元号)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}}, [[1533]]) – {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|ja|朝倉義景}}, {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} (d. [[1573]])<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景}}</ref>. * Year 8 of {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}}, [[1837]]) – {{ill|Ōkura Kihachirō|ja|大倉喜八郎}}, businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥}} (d. [[1928]]). * Year 6 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}}, [[1853]]) – {{ill|Tokugawa Akitake|ja|徳川昭武}}, last lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|水戸藩}} (d. [[1910]]).

[[1599]]). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日}}, [[1716]]) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王}}, 4th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮}} (b. [[1650]]). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}}, [[1724]]) – {{ill|Nishikawa Joken|ja|西川如見}}, {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (b. [[1648]]). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}}, [[1744]]) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}}, {{ill|philosopher|ja|思想家}} (b. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * Year 19 of {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}}, [[1614]]) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} banishes {{ill|Takayama Ukon|ja|高山右近}} and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名}} to {{ill|Manila|ja|マニラ}} and {{ill|Macau|ja|マカオ}}. * Year 3 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}}, [[1870]]) – The {{ill|Dajōkan|ja|太政官}} issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for {{ill|Statistics Day|ja|統計の日}}.

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * Year 19 of {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}}, [[1614]]) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} banishes {{ill|Takayama Ukon|ja|高山右近}} and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名}} to {{ill|Manila|ja|マニラ}} and {{ill|Macau|ja|マカオ}}. * Year 3 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}}, [[1870]]) – The {{ill|Dajōkan|ja|太政官}} issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for {{ill|Statistics Day|ja|統計の日}}.
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}}, [[921]]) – {{ill|Chai Rong|ja|柴栄}}, known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of {{ill|Later Zhou|ja|後周}} (d. [[959]]). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|弘治 (明)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}}, [[1491]]) – The {{ill|Zhengde Emperor|ja|正徳帝}}, the 11th emperor of the {{ill|Ming dynasty|ja|明}} (d. [[1521]]). * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文 (元号)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}}, [[1533]]) – {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|ja|朝倉義景}}, {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} (d. [[1573]])<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景}}</ref>. * Year 8 of {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}}, [[1837]]) – {{ill|Ōkura Kihachirō|ja|大倉喜八郎}}, businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥}} (d. [[1928]]). * Year 6 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}}, [[1853]]) – {{ill|Tokugawa Akitake|ja|徳川昭武}}, last lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|水戸藩}} (d. [[1910]]).

[[sn:September 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿四]] [[zh:九月廿四]] [[en:draft:September 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * Year 19 of {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[1614]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} banishes {{ill|Takayama Ukon|ja|高山右近}} and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名}} to {{ill|Manila|ja|マニラ}} and {{ill|Macau|ja|マカオ}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} , [[1870]] ) – The {{ill|Dajōkan|ja|太政官}} issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for {{ill|Statistics Day|ja|統計の日}} .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[921]] ) – {{ill|Chai Rong|ja|柴栄}} , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of {{ill|Later Zhou|ja|後周}} (d. [[959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|弘治 (明)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1491]] ) – The {{ill|Zhengde Emperor|ja|正徳帝}} , the 11th emperor of the {{ill|Ming dynasty|ja|明}} (d. [[1521]] ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文 (元号)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} , [[1533]] ) – {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|ja|朝倉義景}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} (d. [[1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景}} </ref>. * Year 8 of {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} , [[1837]] ) – {{ill|Ōkura Kihachirō|ja|大倉喜八郎}} , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥}} (d. [[1928]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1853]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Akitake|ja|徳川昭武}} , last lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|水戸藩}} (d. [[1910]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1633]] ) – {{ill|Horio Tadaharu|ja|堀尾忠晴}} , lord of {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (b. [[1599]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日}} , [[1716]] ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王}} , 4th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮}} (b. [[1694]] ). * Year 7 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1722]] ) – {{ill|Ikenishi Gonsui|ja|池西言水}} , {{ill|haiku poet|ja|俳人}} (b. [[1650]] ). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} , [[1724]] ) – {{ill|Nishikawa Joken|ja|西川如見}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (b. [[1648]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} , [[1744]] ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}} , {{ill|philosopher|ja|思想家}} (b. [[1685]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} , [[1859]] ) – {{ill|Satō Issai|ja|佐藤一斎}} , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者}} (b. [[1772]] ).
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]

[[sn:September 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿四]] [[zh:九月廿四]] [[en:draft:September 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * Year 19 of {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[1614]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} banishes {{ill|Takayama Ukon|ja|高山右近}} and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名}} to {{ill|Manila|ja|マニラ}} and {{ill|Macau|ja|マカオ}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} , [[1870]] ) – The {{ill|Dajōkan|ja|太政官}} issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for {{ill|Statistics Day|ja|統計の日}} .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[921]] ) – {{ill|Chai Rong|ja|柴栄}} , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of {{ill|Later Zhou|ja|後周}} (d. [[959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|弘治 (明)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1491]] ) – The {{ill|Zhengde Emperor|ja|正徳帝}} , the 11th emperor of the {{ill|Ming dynasty|ja|明}} (d. [[1521]] ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文 (元号)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} , [[1533]] ) – {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|ja|朝倉義景}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} (d. [[1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景}} </ref>. * Year 8 of {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} , [[1837]] ) – {{ill|Ōkura Kihachirō|ja|大倉喜八郎}} , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥}} (d. [[1928]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1853]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Akitake|ja|徳川昭武}} , last lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|水戸藩}} (d. [[1910]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1633]] ) – {{ill|Horio Tadaharu|ja|堀尾忠晴}} , lord of {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (b. [[1599]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日}} , [[1716]] ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王}} , 4th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮}} (b. [[1694]] ). * Year 7 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1722]] ) – {{ill|Ikenishi Gonsui|ja|池西言水}} , {{ill|haiku poet|ja|俳人}} (b. [[1650]] ). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} , [[1724]] ) – {{ill|Nishikawa Joken|ja|西川如見}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (b. [[1648]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} , [[1744]] ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}} , {{ill|philosopher|ja|思想家}} (b. [[1685]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} , [[1859]] ) – {{ill|Satō Issai|ja|佐藤一斎}} , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者}} (b. [[1772]] ).
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|23|9|25|8|24|10|9|0924}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}}" to "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}}"
revision.text:
[[sn:September 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿四]] [[zh:九月廿四]] [[en:draft:September 24 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * Year 19 of {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[1614]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} banishes {{ill|Takayama Ukon|ja|高山右近}} and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名}} to {{ill|Manila|ja|マニラ}} and {{ill|Macau|ja|マカオ}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} , [[1870]] ) – The {{ill|Dajōkan|ja|太政官}} issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for {{ill|Statistics Day|ja|統計の日}} .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[921]] ) – {{ill|Chai Rong|ja|柴栄}} , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of {{ill|Later Zhou|ja|後周}} (d. [[959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|弘治 (明)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1491]] ) – The {{ill|Zhengde Emperor|ja|正徳帝}} , the 11th emperor of the {{ill|Ming dynasty|ja|明}} (d. [[1521]] ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文 (元号)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} , [[1533]] ) – {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|ja|朝倉義景}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} (d. [[1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景}} </ref>. * Year 8 of {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} , [[1837]] ) – {{ill|Ōkura Kihachirō|ja|大倉喜八郎}} , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥}} (d. [[1928]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1853]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Akitake|ja|徳川昭武}} , last lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|水戸藩}} (d. [[1910]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1633]] ) – {{ill|Horio Tadaharu|ja|堀尾忠晴}} , lord of {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (b. [[1599]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日}} , [[1716]] ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王}} , 4th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮}} (b. [[1694]] ). * Year 7 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1722]] ) – {{ill|Ikenishi Gonsui|ja|池西言水}} , {{ill|haiku poet|ja|俳人}} (b. [[1650]] ). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} , [[1724]] ) – {{ill|Nishikawa Joken|ja|西川如見}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (b. [[1648]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} , [[1744]] ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}} , {{ill|philosopher|ja|思想家}} (b. [[1685]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} , [[1859]] ) – {{ill|Satō Issai|ja|佐藤一斎}} , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者}} (b. [[1772]] ).
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|23|9|25|8|24|10|9|0924}}

[[sn:September 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿四]] [[zh:九月廿四]] [[en:draft:September 24 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * Year 19 of {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[1614]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} banishes {{ill|Takayama Ukon|ja|高山右近}} and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名}} to {{ill|Manila|ja|マニラ}} and {{ill|Macau|ja|マカオ}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} , [[1870]] ) – The {{ill|Dajōkan|ja|太政官}} issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for {{ill|Statistics Day|ja|統計の日}} .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[921]] ) – {{ill|Chai Rong|ja|柴栄}} , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of {{ill|Later Zhou|ja|後周}} (d. [[959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|弘治 (明)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1491]] ) – The {{ill|Zhengde Emperor|ja|正徳帝}} , the 11th emperor of the {{ill|Ming dynasty|ja|明}} (d. [[1521]] ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文 (元号)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} , [[1533]] ) – {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|ja|朝倉義景}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} (d. [[1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景}} </ref>. * Year 8 of {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} , [[1837]] ) – {{ill|Ōkura Kihachirō|ja|大倉喜八郎}} , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥}} (d. [[1928]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1853]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Akitake|ja|徳川昭武}} , last lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|水戸藩}} (d. [[1910]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1633]] ) – {{ill|Horio Tadaharu|ja|堀尾忠晴}} , lord of {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (b. [[1599]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日}} , [[1716]] ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王}} , 4th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮}} (b. [[1694]] ). * Year 7 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1722]] ) – {{ill|Ikenishi Gonsui|ja|池西言水}} , {{ill|haiku poet|ja|俳人}} (b. [[1650]] ). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} , [[1724]] ) – {{ill|Nishikawa Joken|ja|西川如見}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (b. [[1648]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} , [[1744]] ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}} , {{ill|philosopher|ja|思想家}} (b. [[1685]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} , [[1859]] ) – {{ill|Satō Issai|ja|佐藤一斎}} , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者}} (b. [[1772]] ).
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|23|9|25|8|24|10|9|0924}}

[[sn:September 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿四]] [[zh:九月廿四]] [[en:draft:September 24 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * Year 19 of {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[1614]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} banishes {{ill|Takayama Ukon|ja|高山右近}} and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名}} to {{ill|Manila|ja|マニラ}} and {{ill|Macau|ja|マカオ}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} , [[1870]] ) – The {{ill|Dajōkan|ja|太政官}} issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for {{ill|Statistics Day|ja|統計の日}} .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[921]] ) – {{ill|Chai Rong|ja|柴栄}} , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of {{ill|Later Zhou|ja|後周}} (d. [[959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|弘治 (明)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1491]] ) – The {{ill|Zhengde Emperor|ja|正徳帝}} , the 11th emperor of the {{ill|Ming dynasty|ja|明}} (d. [[1521]] ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文 (元号)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} , [[1533]] ) – {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|ja|朝倉義景}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} (d. [[1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景}} </ref>. * Year 8 of {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} , [[1837]] ) – {{ill|Ōkura Kihachirō|ja|大倉喜八郎}} , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥}} (d. [[1928]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1853]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Akitake|ja|徳川昭武}} , last lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|水戸藩}} (d. [[1910]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1633]] ) – {{ill|Horio Tadaharu|ja|堀尾忠晴}} , lord of {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (b. [[1599]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日}} , [[1716]] ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王}} , 4th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮}} (b. [[1694]] ). * Year 7 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1722]] ) – {{ill|Ikenishi Gonsui|ja|池西言水}} , {{ill|haiku poet|ja|俳人}} (b. [[1650]] ). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} , [[1724]] ) – {{ill|Nishikawa Joken|ja|西川如見}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (b. [[1648]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} , [[1744]] ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}} , {{ill|philosopher|ja|思想家}} (b. [[1685]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} , [[1859]] ) – {{ill|Satō Issai|ja|佐藤一斎}} , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|儒学者}} (b. [[1772]] ).
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|23|9|25|8|24|10|9|0924}}

[[sn:September 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿四]] [[zh:九月廿四]] [[en:draft:September 24 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * Year 19 of {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[1614]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} banishes {{ill|Takayama Ukon|ja|高山右近}} and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|キリシタン大名}} to {{ill|Manila|ja|マニラ}} and {{ill|Macau|ja|マカオ}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} , [[1870]] ) – The {{ill|Dajōkan|ja|太政官}} issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for {{ill|Statistics Day|ja|統計の日}} .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[921]] ) – {{ill|Chai Rong|ja|柴栄}} , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of {{ill|Later Zhou|ja|後周}} (d. [[959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|弘治 (明)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1491]] ) – The {{ill|Zhengde Emperor|ja|正徳帝}} , the 11th emperor of the {{ill|Ming dynasty|ja|明}} (d. [[1521]] ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文 (元号)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} , [[1533]] ) – {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|ja|朝倉義景}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} (d. [[1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景}} </ref>. * Year 8 of {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} , [[1837]] ) – {{ill|Ōkura Kihachirō|ja|大倉喜八郎}} , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥}} (d. [[1928]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1853]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Akitake|ja|徳川昭武}} , last lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|水戸藩}} (d. [[1910]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1633]] ) – {{ill|Horio Tadaharu|ja|堀尾忠晴}} , lord of {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (b. [[1599]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日}} , [[1716]] ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王}} , 4th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮}} (b. [[1694]] ). * Year 7 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1722]] ) – {{ill|Ikenishi Gonsui|ja|池西言水}} , {{ill|haiku poet|ja|俳人}} (b. [[1650]] ). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} , [[1724]] ) – {{ill|Nishikawa Joken|ja|西川如見}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (b. [[1648]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} , [[1744]] ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}} , {{ill|philosopher|ja|思想家}} (b. [[1685]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} , [[1859]] ) – {{ill|Satō Issai|ja|佐藤一斎}} , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生}} (b. [[1772]] ).
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|23|9|25|8|24|10|9|0924}}

[[sn:September 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿四]] [[zh:九月廿四]] [[en:draft:September 24 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * Year 19 of {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[1614]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} banishes {{ill|Takayama Ukon|ja|高山右近}} and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|Christian Daimyō}} to {{ill|Manila|ja|マニラ}} and {{ill|Macau|ja|マカオ}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} , [[1870]] ) – The {{ill|Dajōkan|ja|太政官}} issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for {{ill|Statistics Day|ja|統計の日}} .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[921]] ) – {{ill|Chai Rong|ja|柴栄}} , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of {{ill|Later Zhou|ja|後周}} (d. [[959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|Kōji (明)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1491]] ) – The {{ill|Zhengde Emperor|ja|正徳帝}} , the 11th emperor of the {{ill|Ming dynasty|ja|明}} (d. [[1521]] ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文 (元号)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} , [[1533]] ) – {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|ja|朝倉義景}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} (d. [[1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景}} </ref>. * Year 8 of {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} , [[1837]] ) – {{ill|Ōkura Kihachirō|ja|大倉喜八郎}} , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥}} (d. [[1928]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1853]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Akitake|ja|徳川昭武}} , last lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|Mito Domain}} (d. [[1910]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1633]] ) – {{ill|Horio Tadaharu|ja|堀尾忠晴}} , lord of {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (b. [[1599]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日}} , [[1716]] ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王}} , 4th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮}} (b. [[1694]] ). * Year 7 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1722]] ) – {{ill|Ikenishi Gonsui|ja|池西言水}} , {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet}} (b. [[1650]] ). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} , [[1724]] ) – {{ill|Nishikawa Joken|ja|西川如見}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (b. [[1648]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} , [[1744]] ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}} , {{ill|philosopher|ja|Thinker}} (b. [[1685]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} , [[1859]] ) – {{ill|Satō Issai|ja|佐藤一斎}} , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生}} (b. [[1772]] ).
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|23|9|25|8|24|10|9|0924}}

[[sn:September 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿四]] [[zh:九月廿四]] [[en:draft:September 24 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * Year 19 of {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[1614]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} banishes {{ill|Takayama Ukon|ja|高山右近}} and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|Christian Daimyō}} to {{ill|Manila|ja|マニラ}} and {{ill|Macau|ja|マカオ}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} , [[1870]] ) – The {{ill|Dajōkan|ja|太政官}} issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for {{ill|Statistics Day|ja|統計の日}} .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[921]] ) – {{ill|Chai Rong|ja|柴栄}} , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of {{ill|Later Zhou|ja|後周}} (d. [[959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|Kōji (明)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1491]] ) – The {{ill|Zhengde Emperor|ja|正徳帝}} , the 11th emperor of the {{ill|Ming dynasty|ja|明}} (d. [[1521]] ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文 (元号)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} , [[1533]] ) – {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|ja|朝倉義景}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} (d. [[1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景}} </ref>. * Year 8 of {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} , [[1837]] ) – {{ill|Ōkura Kihachirō|ja|大倉喜八郎}} , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥}} (d. [[1928]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1853]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Akitake|ja|徳川昭武}} , last lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|Mito Domain}} (d. [[1910]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1633]] ) – {{ill|Horio Tadaharu|ja|堀尾忠晴}} , lord of {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (b. [[1599]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日}} , [[1716]] ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王}} , 4th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮}} (b. [[1694]] ). * Year 7 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1722]] ) – {{ill|Ikenishi Gonsui|ja|池西言水}} , {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet}} (b. [[1650]] ). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} , [[1724]] ) – {{ill|Nishikawa Joken|ja|西川如見}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (b. [[1648]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} , [[1744]] ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}} , {{ill|philosopher|ja|Thinker}} (b. [[1685]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} , [[1859]] ) – {{ill|Satō Issai|ja|佐藤一斎}} , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生}} (b. [[1772]] ).
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]] == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|23|9|25|8|24|10|9|0924}}

[[sn:September 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿四]] [[zh:九月廿四]] [[en:draft:September 24 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * Year 19 of {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[1614]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} banishes {{ill|Takayama Ukon|ja|高山右近}} and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|Christian Daimyō}} to {{ill|Manila|ja|マニラ}} and {{ill|Macau|ja|マカオ}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} , [[1870]] ) – The {{ill|Dajōkan|ja|太政官}} issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for {{ill|Statistics Day|ja|統計の日}} .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[921]] ) – {{ill|Chai Rong|ja|柴栄}} , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of {{ill|Later Zhou|ja|後周}} (d. [[959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|Kōji (明)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1491]] ) – The {{ill|Zhengde Emperor|ja|正徳帝}} , the 11th emperor of the {{ill|Ming dynasty|ja|明}} (d. [[1521]] ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文 (元号)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} , [[1533]] ) – {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|ja|朝倉義景}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} (d. [[1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景}} </ref>. * Year 8 of {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} , [[1837]] ) – {{ill|Ōkura Kihachirō|ja|大倉喜八郎}} , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥}} (d. [[1928]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1853]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Akitake|ja|徳川昭武}} , last lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|Mito Domain}} (d. [[1910]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1633]] ) – {{ill|Horio Tadaharu|ja|堀尾忠晴}} , lord of {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (b. [[1599]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日}} , [[1716]] ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王}} , 4th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮}} (b. [[1694]] ). * Year 7 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1722]] ) – {{ill|Ikenishi Gonsui|ja|池西言水}} , {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet}} (b. [[1650]] ). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} , [[1724]] ) – {{ill|Nishikawa Joken|ja|西川如見}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (b. [[1648]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} , [[1744]] ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}} , {{ill|philosopher|ja|Thinker}} (b. [[1685]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} , [[1859]] ) – {{ill|Satō Issai|ja|佐藤一斎}} , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生}} (b. [[1772]] ).
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]] == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|23|9|25|8|24|10|9|0924}}

[[sn:September 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿四]] [[zh:九月廿四]] [[en:draft:September 24 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * Year 19 of {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[1614]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} banishes {{ill|Takayama Ukon|ja|高山右近}} and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|Christian Daimyō}} to {{ill|Manila|ja|マニラ}} and {{ill|Macau|ja|マカオ}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} , [[1870]] ) – The {{ill|Dajōkan|ja|太政官}} issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for {{ill|Statistics Day|ja|統計の日}} .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[921]] ) – {{ill|Chai Rong|ja|柴栄}} , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of {{ill|Later Zhou|ja|後周}} (d. [[959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|Kōji (明)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1491]] ) – The {{ill|Zhengde Emperor|ja|正徳帝}} , the 11th emperor of the {{ill|Ming dynasty|ja|明}} (d. [[1521]] ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文 (元号)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} , [[1533]] ) – {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|ja|朝倉義景}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} (d. [[1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景}} </ref>. * Year 8 of {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} , [[1837]] ) – {{ill|Ōkura Kihachirō|ja|大倉喜八郎}} , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥}} (d. [[1928]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1853]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Akitake|ja|徳川昭武}} , last lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|Mito Domain}} (d. [[1910]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1633]] ) – {{ill|Horio Tadaharu|ja|堀尾忠晴}} , lord of {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (b. [[1599]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日}} , [[1716]] ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王}} , 4th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮}} (b. [[1694]] ). * Year 7 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1722]] ) – {{ill|Ikenishi Gonsui|ja|池西言水}} , {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet}} (b. [[1650]] ). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} , [[1724]] ) – {{ill|Nishikawa Joken|ja|西川如見}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (b. [[1648]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} , [[1744]] ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}} , {{ill|philosopher|ja|Thinker}} (b. [[1685]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} , [[1859]] ) – {{ill|Satō Issai|ja|佐藤一斎}} , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生}} (b. [[1772]] ).
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]

[[sn:September 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿四]] [[zh:九月廿四]] [[en:draft:September 24 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * Year 19 of {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[1614]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} banishes {{ill|Takayama Ukon|ja|高山右近}} and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|Christian Daimyō}} to {{ill|Manila|ja|マニラ}} and {{ill|Macau|ja|マカオ}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} , [[1870]] ) – The {{ill|Dajōkan|ja|太政官}} issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for {{ill|Statistics Day|ja|統計の日}} .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[921]] ) – {{ill|Chai Rong|ja|柴栄}} , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of {{ill|Later Zhou|ja|後周}} (d. [[959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|Kōji (明)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1491]] ) – The {{ill|Zhengde Emperor|ja|正徳帝}} , the 11th emperor of the {{ill|Ming dynasty|ja|明}} (d. [[1521]] ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文 (元号)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} , [[1533]] ) – {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|ja|朝倉義景}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} (d. [[1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景}} </ref>. * Year 8 of {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} , [[1837]] ) – {{ill|Ōkura Kihachirō|ja|大倉喜八郎}} , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥}} (d. [[1928]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1853]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Akitake|ja|徳川昭武}} , last lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|Mito Domain}} (d. [[1910]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1633]] ) – {{ill|Horio Tadaharu|ja|堀尾忠晴}} , lord of {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (b. [[1599]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日}} , [[1716]] ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王}} , 4th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮}} (b. [[1694]] ). * Year 7 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1722]] ) – {{ill|Ikenishi Gonsui|ja|池西言水}} , {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet}} (b. [[1650]] ). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} , [[1724]] ) – {{ill|Nishikawa Joken|ja|西川如見}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (b. [[1648]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} , [[1744]] ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}} , {{ill|philosopher|ja|Thinker}} (b. [[1685]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} , [[1859]] ) – {{ill|Satō Issai|ja|佐藤一斎}} , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生}} (b. [[1772]] ).
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]

[[sn:September 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿四]] [[zh:九月廿四]] [[en:draft:September 24 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * Year 19 of {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[1614]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} banishes {{ill|Takayama Ukon|ja|高山右近}} and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|Christian Daimyō}} to {{ill|Manila|ja|マニラ}} and {{ill|Macau|ja|マカオ}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} , [[1870]] ) – The {{ill|Dajōkan|ja|太政官}} issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for {{ill|Statistics Day|ja|統計の日}} .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[921]] ) – {{ill|Chai Rong|ja|柴栄}} , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of {{ill|Later Zhou|ja|後周}} (d. [[959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|Kōji (明)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1491]] ) – The {{ill|Zhengde Emperor|ja|正徳帝}} , the 11th emperor of the {{ill|Ming dynasty|ja|明}} (d. [[1521]] ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文 (元号)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} , [[1533]] ) – {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|ja|朝倉義景}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} (d. [[1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景}} </ref>. * Year 8 of {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} , [[1837]] ) – {{ill|Ōkura Kihachirō|ja|大倉喜八郎}} , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥}} (d. [[1928]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1853]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Akitake|ja|徳川昭武}} , last lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|Mito Domain}} (d. [[1910]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1633]] ) – {{ill|Horio Tadaharu|ja|堀尾忠晴}} , lord of {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (b. [[1599]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日}} , [[1716]] ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王}} , 4th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮}} (b. [[1694]] ). * Year 7 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1722]] ) – {{ill|Ikenishi Gonsui|ja|池西言水}} , {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet}} (b. [[1650]] ). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} , [[1724]] ) – {{ill|Nishikawa Joken|ja|西川如見}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (b. [[1648]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} , [[1744]] ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}} , {{ill|philosopher|ja|Thinker}} (b. [[1685]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} , [[1859]] ) – {{ill|Satō Issai|ja|佐藤一斎}} , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生}} (b. [[1772]] ).
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] to [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:September 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿四]] [[zh:九月廿四]] [[en:draft:September 24 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * Year 19 of {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[1614]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} banishes {{ill|Takayama Ukon|ja|高山右近}} and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|Christian Daimyō}} to {{ill|Manila|ja|マニラ}} and {{ill|Macau|ja|マカオ}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日}} , [[1870]] ) – The {{ill|Dajōkan|ja|太政官}} issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for {{ill|Statistics Day|ja|統計の日}} .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}} , [[921]] ) – {{ill|Chai Rong|ja|柴栄}} , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of {{ill|Later Zhou|ja|後周}} (d. [[959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|Kōji (明)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1491]] ) – The {{ill|Zhengde Emperor|ja|正徳帝}} , the 11th emperor of the {{ill|Ming dynasty|ja|明}} (d. [[1521]] ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文 (元号)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} , [[1533]] ) – {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|ja|朝倉義景}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名}} (d. [[1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景}} </ref>. * Year 8 of {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} , [[1837]] ) – {{ill|Ōkura Kihachirō|ja|大倉喜八郎}} , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥}} (d. [[1928]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1853]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Akitake|ja|徳川昭武}} , last lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|Mito Domain}} (d. [[1910]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} , [[1633]] ) – {{ill|Horio Tadaharu|ja|堀尾忠晴}} , lord of {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (b. [[1599]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日}} , [[1716]] ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王}} , 4th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮}} (b. [[1694]] ). * Year 7 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} , [[1722]] ) – {{ill|Ikenishi Gonsui|ja|池西言水}} , {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet}} (b. [[1650]] ). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} , [[1724]] ) – {{ill|Nishikawa Joken|ja|西川如見}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者}} (b. [[1648]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} , [[1744]] ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩}} , {{ill|philosopher|ja|Thinker}} (b. [[1685]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} , [[1859]] ) – {{ill|Satō Issai|ja|佐藤一斎}} , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生}} (b. [[1772]] ).
[[Category:lunar calendar translation marker]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|23|9|25|8|24|10|9|0924}}

revision.comment: Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
revision.text:
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿四]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft}} .
== Events == * Year 19 of {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日|12=draft}} , [[1614]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|12=draft}} banishes {{ill|Takayama Ukon|ja|高山右近|12=draft}} and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|Christian Daimyō|12=draft}} to {{ill|Manila|ja|マニラ|12=draft}} and {{ill|Macau|ja|マカオ|12=draft}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft}} , [[1870]] ) – The {{ill|Dajōkan|ja|太政官|12=draft}} issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for {{ill|Statistics Day|ja|統計の日|12=draft}} .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日|12=draft}} , [[921]] ) – {{ill|Chai Rong|ja|柴栄|12=draft}} , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of {{ill|Later Zhou|ja|後周|12=draft}} (d. [[959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|Kōji (明)|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft}} , [[1491]] ) – The {{ill|Zhengde Emperor|ja|正徳帝|12=draft}} , the 11th emperor of the {{ill|Ming dynasty|ja|明|12=draft}} (d. [[1521]] ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文 (元号)|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日|12=draft}} , [[1533]] ) – {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|ja|朝倉義景|12=draft}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=draft}} (d. [[1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景}} </ref>. * Year 8 of {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft}} , [[1837]] ) – {{ill|Ōkura Kihachirō|ja|大倉喜八郎|12=draft}} , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥|12=draft}} (d. [[1928]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft}} , [[1853]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Akitake|ja|徳川昭武|12=draft}} , last lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|Mito Domain|12=draft}} (d. [[1910]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft}} , [[1633]] ) – {{ill|Horio Tadaharu|ja|堀尾忠晴|12=draft}} , lord of {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩|12=draft}} (b. [[1599]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日|12=draft}} , [[1716]] ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王|12=draft}} , 4th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮|12=draft}} (b. [[1694]] ). * Year 7 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日|12=draft}} , [[1722]] ) – {{ill|Ikenishi Gonsui|ja|池西言水|12=draft}} , {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|12=draft}} (b. [[1650]] ). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft}} , [[1724]] ) – {{ill|Nishikawa Joken|ja|西川如見|12=draft}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者|12=draft}} (b. [[1648]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|12=draft}} , [[1744]] ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩|12=draft}} , {{ill|philosopher|ja|Thinker|12=draft}} (b. [[1685]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日|12=draft}} , [[1859]] ) – {{ill|Satō Issai|ja|佐藤一斎|12=draft}} , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft}} (b. [[1772]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|23|9|25|8|24|10|9|0924}}
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿四]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿四]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿四]]

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿四]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * Year 19 of {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1614]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|12=draft|12=draft}} banishes {{ill|Takayama Ukon|ja|高山右近|12=draft|12=draft}} and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|Christian Daimyō|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Manila|ja|マニラ|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Macau|ja|マカオ|12=draft|12=draft}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1870]] ) – The {{ill|Dajōkan|ja|太政官|12=draft|12=draft}} issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for {{ill|Statistics Day|ja|統計の日|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)|12=draft|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[921]] ) – {{ill|Chai Rong|ja|柴栄|12=draft|12=draft}} , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of {{ill|Later Zhou|ja|後周|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. [[959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|Kōji (明)|12=draft|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1491]] ) – The {{ill|Zhengde Emperor|ja|正徳帝|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 11th emperor of the {{ill|Ming dynasty|ja|明|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. [[1521]] ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文 (元号)|12=draft|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1533]] ) – {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|ja|朝倉義景|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. [[1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景}} </ref>. * Year 8 of {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1837]] ) – {{ill|Ōkura Kihachirō|ja|大倉喜八郎|12=draft|12=draft}} , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. [[1928]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1853]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Akitake|ja|徳川昭武|12=draft|12=draft}} , last lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|Mito Domain|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. [[1910]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1633]] ) – {{ill|Horio Tadaharu|ja|堀尾忠晴|12=draft|12=draft}} , lord of {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (b. [[1599]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1716]] ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王|12=draft|12=draft}} , 4th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮|12=draft|12=draft}} (b. [[1650]] ). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1724]] ) – {{ill|Nishikawa Joken|ja|西川如見|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者|12=draft|12=draft}} (b. revision.text:
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿四]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * Year 19 of {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1614]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|12=draft|12=draft}} banishes {{ill|Takayama Ukon|ja|高山右近|12=draft|12=draft}} and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|Christian Daimyō|12=draft|12=draft}} to {{ill|Manila|ja|マニラ|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Macau|ja|マカオ|12=draft|12=draft}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 18|ja|10月18日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1870]] ) – The {{ill|Dajōkan|ja|太政官|12=draft|12=draft}} issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for {{ill|Statistics Day|ja|統計の日|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)|12=draft|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[921]] ) – {{ill|Chai Rong|ja|柴栄|12=draft|12=draft}} , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of {{ill|Later Zhou|ja|後周|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. [[959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|Kōji (明)|12=draft|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1491]] ) – The {{ill|Zhengde Emperor|ja|正徳帝|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 11th emperor of the {{ill|Ming dynasty|ja|明|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. [[1521]] ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文 (元号)|12=draft|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1533]] ) – {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|ja|朝倉義景|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. [[1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景}} </ref>. * Year 8 of {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1837]] ) – {{ill|Ōkura Kihachirō|ja|大倉喜八郎|12=draft|12=draft}} , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. [[1928]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1853]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Akitake|ja|徳川昭武|12=draft|12=draft}} , last lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|Mito Domain|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. [[1910]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1633]] ) – {{ill|Horio Tadaharu|ja|堀尾忠晴|12=draft|12=draft}} , lord of {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (b. [[1599]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1716]] ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王|12=draft|12=draft}} , 4th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮|12=draft|12=draft}} (b. [[1694]] ). * Year 7 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1722]] ) – {{ill|Ikenishi Gonsui|ja|池西言水|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|12=draft|12=draft}} (b. [[1650]] ). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1724]] ) – {{ill|Nishikawa Joken|ja|西川如見|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者|12=draft|12=draft}} (b. [[1648]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1744]] ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|philosopher|ja|Thinker|12=draft|12=draft}} (b. [[1685]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1859]] ) – {{ill|Satō Issai|ja|佐藤一斎|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft|12=draft}} (b. [[1772]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|23|9|25|8|24|10|9|0924}}

== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)|12=draft|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[921]] ) – {{ill|Chai Rong|ja|柴栄|12=draft|12=draft}} , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of {{ill|Later Zhou|ja|後周|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. [[959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|Kōji (明)|12=draft|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1491]] ) – The {{ill|Zhengde Emperor|ja|正徳帝|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 11th emperor of the {{ill|Ming dynasty|ja|明|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. [[1521]] ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文 (元号)|12=draft|12=draft}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1533]] ) – {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|ja|朝倉義景|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. [[1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景}} </ref>. * Year 8 of {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1837]] ) – {{ill|Ōkura Kihachirō|ja|大倉喜八郎|12=draft|12=draft}} , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. [[1928]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1853]] ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Akitake|ja|徳川昭武|12=draft|12=draft}} , last lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|Mito Domain|12=draft|12=draft}} (d. [[1910]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1633]] ) – {{ill|Horio Tadaharu|ja|堀尾忠晴|12=draft|12=draft}} , lord of {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (b. [[1599]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 7|ja|11月7日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1716]] ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王|12=draft|12=draft}} , 4th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|ja|有栖川宮|12=draft|12=draft}} (b. [[1694]] ). * Year 7 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1722]] ) – {{ill|Ikenishi Gonsui|ja|池西言水|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|12=draft|12=draft}} (b. [[1650]] ). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1724]] ) – {{ill|Nishikawa Joken|ja|西川如見|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|astronomer|ja|天文学者|12=draft|12=draft}} (b. [[1648]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1744]] ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|ja|石田梅岩|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|philosopher|ja|Thinker|12=draft|12=draft}} (b. [[1685]] ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日|12=draft|12=draft}} , [[1859]] ) – {{ill|Satō Issai|ja|佐藤一斎|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=draft|12=draft}} (b. [[1772]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 19 of [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 27|October 27]] , [[:en:1614|1614]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} banishes [[:en:Justo Takayama|Takayama Ukon]] and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|Christian Daimyō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Manila|Manila]] and [[:en:Macau|Macau]] . * Year 3 of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 18|October 18]] , [[:en:1870|1870]] ) – The [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for [[:en:World Statistics Day|Statistics Day]] .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Longde (Later Liang)|qq=|1=Longde|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11181259}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 27|October 27]] , [[:en:921|921]] ) – [[:en:Chai Rong|Chai Rong]] , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of [[:en:Later Zhou|Later Zhou]] (d. [[:en:959|959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|Kōji (明)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hongzhi Emperor|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 26|October 26]] , [[:en:1491|1491]] ) – The [[:en:Zhengde Emperor|Zhengde Emperor]] , the 11th emperor of the [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] (d. [[:en:1910|1910]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 19 of [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 27|October 27]] , [[:en:1614|1614]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} banishes [[:en:Justo Takayama|Takayama Ukon]] and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|Christian Daimyō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Manila|Manila]] and [[:en:Macau|Macau]] . * Year 3 of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 18|October 18]] , [[:en:1870|1870]] ) – The [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for [[:en:World Statistics Day|Statistics Day]] .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Longde (Later Liang)|qq=|1=Longde|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11181259}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 27|October 27]] , [[:en:921|921]] ) – [[:en:Chai Rong|Chai Rong]] , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of [[:en:Later Zhou|Later Zhou]] (d. [[:en:959|959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|Kōji (明)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hongzhi Emperor|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 26|October 26]] , [[:en:1491|1491]] ) – The [[:en:Zhengde Emperor|Zhengde Emperor]] , the 11th emperor of the [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] (d. [[:en:1521|1521]] ). * Year 2 of [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 12|October 12]] , [[:en:1533|1533]] ) – [[:en:Asakura Yoshikage|Asakura Yoshikage]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|qq=|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (d. [[:en:1573|1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景|qq=}} </ref>. * Year 8 of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 23|October 23]] , [[:en:1837|1837]] ) – [[:en:Ōkura Kihachirō|Ōkura Kihachirō]] , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkura zaibatsu|qq=|1=Ōkura zaibatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432448}} (d. [[:en:1928|1928]] ). * Year 6 of [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 26|October 26]] , [[:en:1853|1853]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Akitake|Tokugawa Akitake]] , last lord of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] (d. [[:en:1910|1910]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 26|October 26]] , [[:en:1633|1633]] ) – [[:en:Horio Tadaharu|Horio Tadaharu]] , lord of [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (b. [[:en:1599|1599]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 7|November 7]] , [[:en:1716|1716]] ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|qq=|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Tadahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11516504}} , 4th head of the [[:en:Arisugawa-no-miya|Arisugawa-no-miya]] (b. [[:en:1694|1694]] ). * Year 7 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 2|November 2]] , [[:en:1722|1722]] ) – {{ill|Ikenishi Gonsui|ja|池西言水|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikenishi Gonsui|qq=|1=Ikenishi Gonsui|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11552255}} , {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|qid=Q135490197|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. [[:en:1648|1648]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 29|October 29]] , [[:en:1744|1744]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Baigan|Ishida Baigan]] , {{ill|philosopher|ja|Thinker|1=thinker|2=ja|3=思想家|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/philosopher|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24885626}} (b. == Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Longde (Later Liang)|qq=|1=Longde|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11181259}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 27|October 27]] , [[:en:921|921]] ) – [[:en:Chai Rong|Chai Rong]] , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of [[:en:Later Zhou|Later Zhou]] (d. [[:en:959|959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|Kōji (明)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hongzhi Emperor|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 26|October 26]] , [[:en:1491|1491]] ) – The [[:en:Zhengde Emperor|Zhengde Emperor]] , the 11th emperor of the [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] (d. [[:en:1521|1521]] ). * Year 2 of [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 12|October 12]] , [[:en:1533|1533]] ) – [[:en:Asakura Yoshikage|Asakura Yoshikage]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|qq=|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (d. [[:en:1910|1910]] ).

[[:en:1648|1648]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 29|October 29]] , [[:en:1744|1744]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Baigan|Ishida Baigan]] , {{ill|philosopher|ja|Thinker|1=thinker|2=ja|3=思想家|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/philosopher|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24885626}} (b. <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿四]][[zh:九月廿四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840207]] Wikidata name: 24th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 24|qq=September 24}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 19 of [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 27|October 27]] , [[:en:1614|1614]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} banishes [[:en:Justo Takayama|Takayama Ukon]] and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|Christian Daimyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Manila|Manila]] and [[:en:Macau|Macau]] . * Year 3 of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 18|October 18]] , [[:en:1870|1870]] ) – The [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for [[:en:World Statistics Day|Statistics Day]] .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Longde (Later Liang)|1=Longde|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11181259}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 27|October 27]] , [[:en:921|921]] ) – [[:en:Chai Rong|Chai Rong]] , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of [[:en:Later Zhou|Later Zhou]] (d. [[:en:959|959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|Kōji (明)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hongzhi Emperor|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 26|October 26]] , [[:en:1491|1491]] ) – The [[:en:Zhengde Emperor|Zhengde Emperor]] , the 11th emperor of the [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] (d. [[:en:1521|1521]] ). * Year 2 of [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 12|October 12]] , [[:en:1533|1533]] ) – [[:en:Asakura Yoshikage|Asakura Yoshikage]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (d. [[:en:1573|1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景|qq=}} </ref>. * Year 8 of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 23|October 23]] , [[:en:1837|1837]] ) – [[:en:Ōkura Kihachirō|Ōkura Kihachirō]] , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkura zaibatsu|1=Ōkura zaibatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432448}} (d. [[:en:1910|1910]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 26|October 26]] , [[:en:1633|1633]] ) – [[:en:Horio Tadaharu|Horio Tadaharu]] , lord of [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (b. [[:en:1599|1599]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 7|November 7]] , [[:en:1716|1716]] ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Tadahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11516504}} , 4th head of the [[:en:Arisugawa-no-miya|Arisugawa-no-miya]] (b. [[:en:1650|1650]] ). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 9|November 9]] , [[:en:1724|1724]] ) – [[:en:Nishikawa Joken|Nishikawa Joken]] , [[:en:Astronomer|astronomer]] (b.
