<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿四]][[zh:九月廿四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840207]] Wikidata name: 24th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 24|qq=September 24}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 19 of [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 27|October 27]] , [[:en:1614|1614]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} banishes [[:en:Justo Takayama|Takayama Ukon]] and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|Christian Daimyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Manila|Manila]] and [[:en:Macau|Macau]] . * Year 3 of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 18|October 18]] , [[:en:1870|1870]] ) – The [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for [[:en:World Statistics Day|Statistics Day]] .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Longde (Later Liang)|1=Longde|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11181259}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 27|October 27]] , [[:en:921|921]] ) – [[:en:Chai Rong|Chai Rong]] , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of [[:en:Later Zhou|Later Zhou]] (d. [[:en:959|959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|Kōji (明)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hongzhi Emperor|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 26|October 26]] , [[:en:1491|1491]] ) – The [[:en:Zhengde Emperor|Zhengde Emperor]] , the 11th emperor of the [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] (d. [[:en:1521|1521]] ). * Year 2 of [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 12|October 12]] , [[:en:1533|1533]] ) – [[:en:Asakura Yoshikage|Asakura Yoshikage]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (d. [[:en:1573|1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景|qq=}} </ref>. * Year 8 of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 23|October 23]] , [[:en:1837|1837]] ) – [[:en:Ōkura Kihachirō|Ōkura Kihachirō]] , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkura zaibatsu|1=Ōkura zaibatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432448}} (d. [[:en:1928|1928]] ). * Year 6 of [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 26|October 26]] , [[:en:1853|1853]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Akitake|Tokugawa Akitake]] , last lord of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] (d. [[:en:1910|1910]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 26|October 26]] , [[:en:1633|1633]] ) – [[:en:Horio Tadaharu|Horio Tadaharu]] , lord of [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (b. [[:en:1599|1599]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 7|November 7]] , [[:en:1716|1716]] ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Tadahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11516504}} , 4th head of the [[:en:Arisugawa-no-miya|Arisugawa-no-miya]] (b. [[:en:1694|1694]] ). * Year 7 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 2|November 2]] , [[:en:1722|1722]] ) – {{ill|Ikenishi Gonsui|ja|池西言水|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikenishi Gonsui|1=Ikenishi Gonsui|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11552255}} , {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. [[:en:1650|1650]] ). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 9|November 9]] , [[:en:1724|1724]] ) – [[:en:Nishikawa Joken|Nishikawa Joken]] , [[:en:Astronomer|astronomer]] (b. [[:en:1648|1648]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 29|October 29]] , [[:en:1744|1744]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Baigan|Ishida Baigan]] , {{ill|philosopher|ja|Thinker|1=thinker|2=ja|3=思想家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/philosopher|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24885626}} (b. [[:en:1685|1685]] ). * Year 6 of [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 14|November 14]] , [[:en:1859|1859]] ) – [[:en:Satō Issai|Satō Issai]] , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (b. [[:en:1772|1772]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿四]][[zh:九月廿四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840207]] Wikidata name: 24th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 24|qq=September 24}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 19 of [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 27|October 27]] , [[:en:1614|1614]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} banishes [[:en:Justo Takayama|Takayama Ukon]] and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|Christian Daimyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Manila|Manila]] and [[:en:Macau|Macau]] . * Year 3 of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 18|October 18]] , [[:en:1870|1870]] ) – The [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for [[:en:World Statistics Day|Statistics Day]] .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Longde (Later Liang)|1=Longde|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11181259}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 27|October 27]] , [[:en:921|921]] ) – [[:en:Chai Rong|Chai Rong]] , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of [[:en:Later Zhou|Later Zhou]] (d. [[:en:959|959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|Kōji (明)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hongzhi Emperor|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 26|October 26]] , [[:en:1491|1491]] ) – The [[:en:Zhengde Emperor|Zhengde Emperor]] , the 11th emperor of the [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] (d. [[:en:1521|1521]] ). * Year 2 of [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 12|October 12]] , [[:en:1533|1533]] ) – [[:en:Asakura Yoshikage|Asakura Yoshikage]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (d. [[:en:1573|1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景|qq=}} </ref>. * Year 8 of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 23|October 23]] , [[:en:1837|1837]] ) – [[:en:Ōkura Kihachirō|Ōkura Kihachirō]] , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkura zaibatsu|1=Ōkura zaibatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432448}} (d. [[:en:1928|1928]] ). * Year 6 of [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 26|October 26]] , [[:en:1853|1853]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Akitake|Tokugawa Akitake]] , last lord of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] (d. [[:en:1910|1910]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 26|October 26]] , [[:en:1633|1633]] ) – [[:en:Horio Tadaharu|Horio Tadaharu]] , lord of [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (b. [[:en:1599|1599]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 7|November 7]] , [[:en:1716|1716]] ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Tadahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11516504}} , 4th head of the [[:en:Arisugawa-no-miya|Arisugawa-no-miya]] (b. [[:en:1694|1694]] ). * Year 7 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 2|November 2]] , [[:en:1722|1722]] ) – {{ill|Ikenishi Gonsui|ja|池西言水|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikenishi Gonsui|1=Ikenishi Gonsui|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11552255}} , {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. [[:en:1650|1650]] ). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 9|November 9]] , [[:en:1724|1724]] ) – [[:en:Nishikawa Joken|Nishikawa Joken]] , [[:en:Astronomer|astronomer]] (b. [[:en:1648|1648]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 29|October 29]] , [[:en:1744|1744]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Baigan|Ishida Baigan]] , {{ill|philosopher|ja|Thinker|1=thinker|2=ja|3=思想家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/philosopher|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24885626}} (b. [[:en:1685|1685]] ). * Year 6 of [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 14|November 14]] , [[:en:1859|1859]] ) – [[:en:Satō Issai|Satō Issai]] , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (b. [[:en:1772|1772]] ).

[[:en:959|959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|Kōji (明)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hongzhi Emperor|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 26|October 26]] , [[:en:1491|1491]] ) – The [[:en:Zhengde Emperor|Zhengde Emperor]] , the 11th emperor of the [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] (d. [[:en:1521|1521]] ). * Year 2 of [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 12|October 12]] , [[:en:1533|1533]] ) – [[:en:Asakura Yoshikage|Asakura Yoshikage]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (d. [[:en:1573|1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景|qq=}} </ref>. * Year 8 of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 23|October 23]] , [[:en:1837|1837]] ) – [[:en:Ōkura Kihachirō|Ōkura Kihachirō]] , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkura zaibatsu|1=Ōkura zaibatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432448}} (d. [[:en:1928|1928]] ). * Year 6 of [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 26|October 26]] , [[:en:1853|1853]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Akitake|Tokugawa Akitake]] , last lord of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] (d. [[:en:1910|1910]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 26|October 26]] , [[:en:1633|1633]] ) – [[:en:Horio Tadaharu|Horio Tadaharu]] , lord of [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (b. [[:en:1599|1599]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 7|November 7]] , [[:en:1716|1716]] ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Tadahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11516504}} , 4th head of the [[:en:Arisugawa-no-miya|Arisugawa-no-miya]] (b. [[:en:1694|1694]] ). * Year 7 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 2|November 2]] , [[:en:1722|1722]] ) – {{ill|Ikenishi Gonsui|ja|池西言水|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikenishi Gonsui|1=Ikenishi Gonsui|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11552255}} , {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. [[:en:1650|1650]] ). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 9|November 9]] , [[:en:1724|1724]] ) – [[:en:Nishikawa Joken|Nishikawa Joken]] , [[:en:Astronomer|astronomer]] (b. [[:en:1648|1648]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 29|October 29]] , [[:en:1744|1744]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Baigan|Ishida Baigan]] , {{ill|philosopher|ja|Thinker|1=thinker|2=ja|3=思想家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/philosopher|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24885626}} (b. [[:en:1685|1685]] ). * Year 6 of [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 14|November 14]] , [[:en:1859|1859]] ) – [[:en:Satō Issai|Satō Issai]] , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (b. <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿四]][[zh:九月廿四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840207]] Wikidata name: 24th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 24|qq=September 24}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 19 of [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 27|October 27]] , [[:en:1614|1614]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} banishes [[:en:Justo Takayama|Takayama Ukon]] and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|Christian Daimyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Manila|Manila]] and [[:en:Macau|Macau]] . * Year 3 of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 18|October 18]] , [[:en:1870|1870]] ) – The [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for [[:en:World Statistics Day|Statistics Day]] .

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 24일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月廿四]][[zh:九月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 24일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月廿四]][[zh:九月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿四]][[zh:九月廿四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840207]] Wikidata name: 24th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 24|qq=September 24}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 19 of [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 27|October 27]] , [[:en:1614|1614]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} banishes [[:en:Justo Takayama|Takayama Ukon]] and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|Christian Daimyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Manila|Manila]] and [[:en:Macau|Macau]] . * Year 3 of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 18|October 18]] , [[:en:1870|1870]] ) – The [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for [[:en:World Statistics Day|Statistics Day]] .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Longde (Later Liang)|1=Longde|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11181259}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 27|October 27]] , [[:en:921|921]] ) – [[:en:Chai Rong|Chai Rong]] , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of [[:en:Later Zhou|Later Zhou]] (d. [[:en:959|959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|Kōji (明)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hongzhi Emperor|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 26|October 26]] , [[:en:1491|1491]] ) – The [[:en:Zhengde Emperor|Zhengde Emperor]] , the 11th emperor of the [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] (d. [[:en:1521|1521]] ). * Year 2 of [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 12|October 12]] , [[:en:1533|1533]] ) – [[:en:Asakura Yoshikage|Asakura Yoshikage]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (d. [[:en:1573|1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景|qq=}} </ref>. * Year 8 of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 23|October 23]] , [[:en:1837|1837]] ) – [[:en:Ōkura Kihachirō|Ōkura Kihachirō]] , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkura zaibatsu|1=Ōkura zaibatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432448}} (d. [[:en:1928|1928]] ). * Year 6 of [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 26|October 26]] , [[:en:1853|1853]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Akitake|Tokugawa Akitake]] , last lord of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] (d. [[:en:1910|1910]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 26|October 26]] , [[:en:1633|1633]] ) – [[:en:Horio Tadaharu|Horio Tadaharu]] , lord of [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (b. [[:en:1599|1599]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 7|November 7]] , [[:en:1716|1716]] ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Tadahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11516504}} , 4th head of the [[:en:Arisugawa-no-miya|Arisugawa-no-miya]] (b. [[:en:1694|1694]] ). * Year 7 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 2|November 2]] , [[:en:1722|1722]] ) – {{ill|Ikenishi Gonsui|ja|池西言水|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikenishi Gonsui|1=Ikenishi Gonsui|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11552255}} , {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. [[:en:1650|1650]] ). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 9|November 9]] , [[:en:1724|1724]] ) – [[:en:Nishikawa Joken|Nishikawa Joken]] , [[:en:Astronomer|astronomer]] (b. [[:en:1648|1648]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 29|October 29]] , [[:en:1744|1744]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Baigan|Ishida Baigan]] , {{ill|philosopher|ja|Thinker|1=thinker|2=ja|3=思想家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/philosopher|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24885626}} (b. [[:en:1685|1685]] ). * Year 6 of [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 14|November 14]] , [[:en:1859|1859]] ) – [[:en:Satō Issai|Satō Issai]] , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (b. [[:en:1772|1772]] ).

[[:en:1521|1521]] ). * Year 2 of [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 12|October 12]] , [[:en:1533|1533]] ) – [[:en:Asakura Yoshikage|Asakura Yoshikage]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (d. [[:en:1573|1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景|qq=}} </ref>. * Year 8 of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 23|October 23]] , [[:en:1837|1837]] ) – [[:en:Ōkura Kihachirō|Ōkura Kihachirō]] , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkura zaibatsu|1=Ōkura zaibatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432448}} (d. [[:en:1910|1910]] ).

[[:en:1599|1599]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 7|November 7]] , [[:en:1716|1716]] ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Tadahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11516504}} , 4th head of the [[:en:Arisugawa-no-miya|Arisugawa-no-miya]] (b. [[:en:1694|1694]] ). * Year 7 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 2|November 2]] , [[:en:1722|1722]] ) – {{ill|Ikenishi Gonsui|ja|池西言水|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikenishi Gonsui|1=Ikenishi Gonsui|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11552255}} , {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 19 of [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 27|October 27]] , [[:en:1614|1614]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} banishes [[:en:Justo Takayama|Takayama Ukon]] and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|Christian Daimyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Manila|Manila]] and [[:en:Macau|Macau]] . * Year 3 of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 18|October 18]] , [[:en:1870|1870]] ) – The [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for [[:en:World Statistics Day|Statistics Day]] .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Longde (Later Liang)|1=Longde|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11181259}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 27|October 27]] , [[:en:921|921]] ) – [[:en:Chai Rong|Chai Rong]] , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of [[:en:Later Zhou|Later Zhou]] (d. [[:en:959|959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|Kōji (明)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hongzhi Emperor|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 26|October 26]] , [[:en:1491|1491]] ) – The [[:en:Zhengde Emperor|Zhengde Emperor]] , the 11th emperor of the [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] (d. [[:en:1521|1521]] ). * Year 2 of [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 12|October 12]] , [[:en:1533|1533]] ) – [[:en:Asakura Yoshikage|Asakura Yoshikage]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (d. [[:en:1573|1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景|qq=}} </ref>. * Year 8 of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 23|October 23]] , [[:en:1837|1837]] ) – [[:en:Ōkura Kihachirō|Ōkura Kihachirō]] , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkura zaibatsu|1=Ōkura zaibatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432448}} (d. [[:en:1928|1928]] ). * Year 6 of [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 26|October 26]] , [[:en:1853|1853]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Akitake|Tokugawa Akitake]] , last lord of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] (d. [[:en:1910|1910]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 26|October 26]] , [[:en:1633|1633]] ) – [[:en:Horio Tadaharu|Horio Tadaharu]] , lord of [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (b. <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿四]][[zh:九月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿四]][[zh:九月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿四]][[zh:九月廿四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840207]] Wikidata name: 24th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 24|qq=September 24}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 19 of [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 27|October 27]] , [[:en:1614|1614]] ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} banishes [[:en:Justo Takayama|Takayama Ukon]] and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|Christian Daimyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to [[:en:Manila|Manila]] and [[:en:Macau|Macau]] . * Year 3 of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 18|October 18]] , [[:en:1870|1870]] ) – The [[:en:Daijō-kan|Daijō-kan]] issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for [[:en:World Statistics Day|Statistics Day]] .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Longde (Later Liang)|1=Longde|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11181259}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 27|October 27]] , [[:en:921|921]] ) – [[:en:Chai Rong|Chai Rong]] , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of [[:en:Later Zhou|Later Zhou]] (d. [[:en:959|959]] ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|Kōji (明)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hongzhi Emperor|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar [[:en:October 26|October 26]] , [[:en:1491|1491]] ) – The [[:en:Zhengde Emperor|Zhengde Emperor]] , the 11th emperor of the [[:en:Ming dynasty|Ming dynasty]] (d. [[:en:1521|1521]] ). * Year 2 of [[:en:Tenbun|Tenbun]] (Julian calendar [[:en:October 12|October 12]] , [[:en:1533|1533]] ) – [[:en:Asakura Yoshikage|Asakura Yoshikage]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (d. [[:en:1573|1573]] )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景|qq=}} </ref>. * Year 8 of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 23|October 23]] , [[:en:1837|1837]] ) – [[:en:Ōkura Kihachirō|Ōkura Kihachirō]] , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkura zaibatsu|1=Ōkura zaibatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432448}} (d. [[:en:1928|1928]] ). * Year 6 of [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 26|October 26]] , [[:en:1853|1853]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Akitake|Tokugawa Akitake]] , last lord of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] (d. [[:en:1910|1910]] ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 26|October 26]] , [[:en:1633|1633]] ) – [[:en:Horio Tadaharu|Horio Tadaharu]] , lord of [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (b. [[:en:1599|1599]] ). * Year 1 of [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 7|November 7]] , [[:en:1716|1716]] ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Tadahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11516504}} , 4th head of the [[:en:Arisugawa-no-miya|Arisugawa-no-miya]] (b. [[:en:1694|1694]] ). * Year 7 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 2|November 2]] , [[:en:1722|1722]] ) – {{ill|Ikenishi Gonsui|ja|池西言水|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikenishi Gonsui|1=Ikenishi Gonsui|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11552255}} , {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. [[:en:1650|1650]] ). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 9|November 9]] , [[:en:1724|1724]] ) – [[:en:Nishikawa Joken|Nishikawa Joken]] , [[:en:Astronomer|astronomer]] (b. [[:en:1648|1648]] ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} (Gregorian calendar [[:en:October 29|October 29]] , [[:en:1744|1744]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Baigan|Ishida Baigan]] , {{ill|philosopher|ja|Thinker|1=thinker|2=ja|3=思想家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/philosopher|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24885626}} (b. [[:en:1685|1685]] ). * Year 6 of [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] (Gregorian calendar [[:en:November 14|November 14]] , [[:en:1859|1859]] ) – [[:en:Satō Issai|Satō Issai]] , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (b. [[:en:1772|1772]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿四]][[zh:九月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿四]][[zh:九月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿四]][[zh:九月廿四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840207]] Wikidata name: 24th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 24|qq=September 24}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 19 of {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 27|en|October 27|WD=Q2956|lt=October 27}} , {{ill|1614|en|1614|WD=Q6781|lt=1614}} ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} banishes {{ill|Justo Takayama|en|Justo Takayama|WD=Q749873|lt=Takayama Ukon}} and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|Christian Daimyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to {{ill|Manila|en|Manila|WD=Q1461|lt=Manila}} and {{ill|Macau|en|Macau|WD=Q14773|lt=Macau}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 18|en|October 18|WD=Q2964|lt=October 18}} , {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} ) – The {{ill|Daijō-kan|en|Daijō-kan|WD=Q1192939|lt=Daijō-kan}} issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for {{ill|World Statistics Day|en|World Statistics Day|WD=Q1056713|lt=Statistics Day}} .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Longde (Later Liang)|1=Longde|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11181259}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 27|en|October 27|WD=Q2956|lt=October 27}} , {{ill|921|en|921|WD=Q30102|lt=921}} ) – {{ill|Chai Rong|en|Chai Rong|WD=Q1319646|lt=Chai Rong}} , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of {{ill|Later Zhou|en|Later Zhou|WD=Q1154556|lt=Later Zhou}} (d. {{ill|959|en|959|WD=Q23750|lt=959}} ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|Kōji (明)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hongzhi Emperor|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 26|en|October 26|WD=Q2953|lt=October 26}} , {{ill|1491|en|1491|WD=Q6676|lt=1491}} ) – The {{ill|Zhengde Emperor|en|Zhengde Emperor|WD=Q10007|lt=Zhengde Emperor}} , the 11th emperor of the {{ill|Ming dynasty|en|Ming dynasty|WD=Q9903|lt=Ming dynasty}} (d. {{ill|1521|en|1521|WD=Q6288|lt=1521}} ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|WD=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 12|en|October 12|WD=Q2920|lt=October 12}} , {{ill|1533|en|1533|WD=Q6443|lt=1533}} ) – {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|en|Asakura Yoshikage|WD=Q1322768|lt=Asakura Yoshikage}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (d. {{ill|1573|en|1573|WD=Q6678|lt=1573}} )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景|qq=}} </ref>. * Year 8 of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23}} , {{ill|1837|en|1837|WD=Q7608|lt=1837}} ) – {{ill|Ōkura Kihachirō|en|Ōkura Kihachirō|WD=Q3594034|lt=Ōkura Kihachirō}} , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkura zaibatsu|1=Ōkura zaibatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432448}} (d. {{ill|1928|en|1928|WD=Q19715|lt=1928}} ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|en|October 26|WD=Q2953|lt=October 26}} , {{ill|1853|en|1853|WD=Q7666|lt=1853}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Akitake|en|Tokugawa Akitake|WD=Q3530485|lt=Tokugawa Akitake}} , last lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|en|Mito Domain|WD=Q1146904|lt=Mito Domain}} (d. {{ill|1910|en|1910|WD=Q2075|lt=1910}} ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|en|October 26|WD=Q2953|lt=October 26}} , {{ill|1633|en|1633|WD=Q6870|lt=1633}} ) – {{ill|Horio Tadaharu|en|Horio Tadaharu|WD=Q5903277|lt=Horio Tadaharu}} , lord of {{ill|Matsue Domain|en|Matsue Domain|WD=Q1017072|lt=Matsue Domain}} (b. {{ill|1599|en|1599|WD=Q6803|lt=1599}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 7|en|November 7|WD=Q2989|lt=November 7}} , {{ill|1716|en|1716|WD=Q6892|lt=1716}} ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Tadahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11516504}} , 4th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|en|Arisugawa-no-miya|WD=Q2861427|lt=Arisugawa-no-miya}} (b. {{ill|1694|en|1694|WD=Q7694|lt=1694}} ). * Year 7 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|en|November 2|WD=Q2996|lt=November 2}} , {{ill|1722|en|1722|WD=Q6918|lt=1722}} ) – {{ill|Ikenishi Gonsui|ja|池西言水|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikenishi Gonsui|1=Ikenishi Gonsui|comment=changed title based on {{ill|1650|en|1650|WD=Q6951|lt=1650}} ). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 9|en|November 9|WD=Q2991|lt=November 9}} , {{ill|1724|en|1724|WD=Q6926|lt=1724}} ) – {{ill|Nishikawa Joken|en|Nishikawa Joken|WD=Q2753679|lt=Nishikawa Joken}} , {{ill|Astronomer|en|Astronomer|WD=Q11063|lt=astronomer}} (b. {{ill|1648|en|1648|WD=Q6941|lt=1648}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 29|en|October 29|WD=Q2951|lt=October 29}} , {{ill|1744|en|1744|WD=Q7583|lt=1744}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|en|Ishida Baigan|WD=Q1319454|lt=Ishida Baigan}} , {{ill|philosopher|ja|Thinker|1=thinker|2=ja|3=思想家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/philosopher|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24885626}} (b. {{ill|1685|en|1685|WD=Q7660|lt=1685}} ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 14|en|November 14|WD=Q2983|lt=November 14}} , {{ill|1859|en|1859|WD=Q7687|lt=1859}} ) – {{ill|Satō Issai|en|Satō Issai|WD=Q6463901|lt=Satō Issai}} , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (b. {{ill|1772|en|1772|WD=Q7690|lt=1772}} ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿四]][[zh:九月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿四]][[zh:九月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿四]][[zh:九月廿四]]
{{Not to be confused with|September 24|qq=September 24}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 19 of {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 27|en|October 27|WD=Q2956|lt=October 27}} , {{ill|1614|en|1614|WD=Q6781|lt=1614}} ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} banishes {{ill|Justo Takayama|en|Justo Takayama|WD=Q749873|lt=Takayama Ukon}} and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|Christian Daimyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to {{ill|Manila|en|Manila|WD=Q1461|lt=Manila}} and {{ill|Macau|en|Macau|WD=Q14773|lt=Macau}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 18|en|October 18|WD=Q2964|lt=October 18}} , {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} ) – The {{ill|Daijō-kan|en|Daijō-kan|WD=Q1192939|lt=Daijō-kan}} issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for {{ill|World Statistics Day|en|World Statistics Day|WD=Q1056713|lt=Statistics Day}} .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Longde (Later Liang)|1=Longde|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11181259}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 27|en|October 27|WD=Q2956|lt=October 27}} , {{ill|921|en|921|WD=Q30102|lt=921}} ) – {{ill|Chai Rong|en|Chai Rong|WD=Q1319646|lt=Chai Rong}} , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of {{ill|Later Zhou|en|Later Zhou|WD=Q1154556|lt=Later Zhou}} (d. {{ill|959|en|959|WD=Q23750|lt=959}} ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|Kōji (明)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hongzhi Emperor|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 26|en|October 26|WD=Q2953|lt=October 26}} , {{ill|1491|en|1491|WD=Q6676|lt=1491}} ) – The {{ill|Zhengde Emperor|en|Zhengde Emperor|WD=Q10007|lt=Zhengde Emperor}} , the 11th emperor of the {{ill|Ming dynasty|en|Ming dynasty|WD=Q9903|lt=Ming dynasty}} (d. {{ill|1521|en|1521|WD=Q6288|lt=1521}} ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|WD=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 12|en|October 12|WD=Q2920|lt=October 12}} , {{ill|1533|en|1533|WD=Q6443|lt=1533}} ) – {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|en|Asakura Yoshikage|WD=Q1322768|lt=Asakura Yoshikage}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (d. {{ill|1573|en|1573|WD=Q6678|lt=1573}} )<ref>{{Kotobank|朝倉義景|qq=}} </ref>. * Year 8 of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23}} , {{ill|1837|en|1837|WD=Q7608|lt=1837}} ) – {{ill|Ōkura Kihachirō|en|Ōkura Kihachirō|WD=Q3594034|lt=Ōkura Kihachirō}} , businessman and founder of the {{ill|Ōkura zaibatsu|ja|大倉財閥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkura zaibatsu|1=Ōkura zaibatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432448}} (d. {{ill|1928|en|1928|WD=Q19715|lt=1928}} ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|en|October 26|WD=Q2953|lt=October 26}} , {{ill|1853|en|1853|WD=Q7666|lt=1853}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Akitake|en|Tokugawa Akitake|WD=Q3530485|lt=Tokugawa Akitake}} , last lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|en|Mito Domain|WD=Q1146904|lt=Mito Domain}} (d. {{ill|1910|en|1910|WD=Q2075|lt=1910}} ).
== Deaths == * Year 10 of {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|en|October 26|WD=Q2953|lt=October 26}} , {{ill|1633|en|1633|WD=Q6870|lt=1633}} ) – {{ill|Horio Tadaharu|en|Horio Tadaharu|WD=Q5903277|lt=Horio Tadaharu}} , lord of {{ill|Matsue Domain|en|Matsue Domain|WD=Q1017072|lt=Matsue Domain}} (b. {{ill|1599|en|1599|WD=Q6803|lt=1599}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 7|en|November 7|WD=Q2989|lt=November 7}} , {{ill|1716|en|1716|WD=Q6892|lt=1716}} ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Arisugawa no Miya Masahito|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Tadahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11516504}} , 4th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|en|Arisugawa-no-miya|WD=Q2861427|lt=Arisugawa-no-miya}} (b. {{ill|1694|en|1694|WD=Q7694|lt=1694}} ). * Year 7 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 2|en|November 2|WD=Q2996|lt=November 2}} , {{ill|1722|en|1722|WD=Q6918|lt=1722}} ) – {{ill|Ikenishi Gonsui|ja|池西言水|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikenishi Gonsui|1=Ikenishi Gonsui|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11552255}} , {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. {{ill|1650|en|1650|WD=Q6951|lt=1650}} ). * Year 9 of Kyōhō (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 9|en|November 9|WD=Q2991|lt=November 9}} , {{ill|1724|en|1724|WD=Q6926|lt=1724}} ) – {{ill|Nishikawa Joken|en|Nishikawa Joken|WD=Q2753679|lt=Nishikawa Joken}} , {{ill|Astronomer|en|Astronomer|WD=Q11063|lt=astronomer}} (b. {{ill|1648|en|1648|WD=Q6941|lt=1648}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 29|en|October 29|WD=Q2951|lt=October 29}} , {{ill|1744|en|1744|WD=Q7583|lt=1744}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Baigan|en|Ishida Baigan|WD=Q1319454|lt=Ishida Baigan}} , {{ill|philosopher|ja|Thinker|1=thinker|2=ja|3=思想家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/philosopher|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q24885626}} (b. {{ill|1685|en|1685|WD=Q7660|lt=1685}} ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|November 14|en|November 14|WD=Q2983|lt=November 14}} , {{ill|1859|en|1859|WD=Q7687|lt=1859}} ) – {{ill|Satō Issai|en|Satō Issai|WD=Q6463901|lt=Satō Issai}} , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (b. {{ill|1772|en|1772|WD=Q7690|lt=1772}} ).

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 19 of {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 27|en|October 27|WD=Q2956|lt=October 27|1=October 27}} , {{ill|1614|en|1614|WD=Q6781|lt=1614|1=1614}} ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} banishes {{ill|Justo Takayama|en|Justo Takayama|WD=Q749873|lt=Takayama Ukon|1=Justo Takayama}} and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|Christian Daimyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to {{ill|Manila|en|Manila|WD=Q1461|lt=Manila|1=Manila}} and {{ill|Macau|en|Macau|WD=Q14773|lt=Macau|1=Macau}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 18|en|October 18|WD=Q2964|lt=October 18|1=October 18}} , {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} ) – The {{ill|Daijō-kan|en|Daijō-kan|WD=Q1192939|lt=Daijō-kan|1=Daijō-kan}} issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for {{ill|World Statistics Day|en|World Statistics Day|WD=Q1056713|lt=Statistics Day|1=World Statistics Day}} .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Longde (Later Liang)|1=Longde|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11181259}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 27|en|October 27|WD=Q2956|lt=October 27|1=October 27}} , {{ill|921|en|921|WD=Q30102|lt=921|1=921}} ) – {{ill|Chai Rong|en|Chai Rong|WD=Q1319646|lt=Chai Rong|1=Chai Rong}} , known as Emperor Shizong, the second emperor of {{ill|Later Zhou|en|Later Zhou|WD=Q1154556|lt=Later Zhou|1=Later Zhou}} (d. {{ill|959|en|959|WD=Q23750|lt=959|1=959}} ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Hongzhi Emperor|ja|Kōji (明)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hongzhi Emperor|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 26|en|October 26|WD=Q2953|lt=October 26|1=October 26}} , {{ill|1491|en|1491|WD=Q6676|lt=1491|1=1491}} ) – The {{ill|Zhengde Emperor|en|Zhengde Emperor|WD=Q10007|lt=Zhengde Emperor|1=Zhengde Emperor}} , the 11th emperor of the {{ill|Ming dynasty|en|Ming dynasty|WD=Q9903|lt=Ming dynasty|1=Ming dynasty}} (d. {{ill|1521|en|1521|WD=Q6288|lt=1521|1=1521}} ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|WD=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun|1=Tenbun}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 12|en|October 12|WD=Q2920|lt=October 12|1=October 12}} , {{ill|1533|en|1533|WD=Q6443|lt=1533|1=1533}} ) – {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|en|Asakura Yoshikage|WD=Q1322768|lt=Asakura Yoshikage|1=Asakura Yoshikage}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (d. 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23|1=October 23}} , {{ill|1837|en|1837|WD=Q7608|lt=1837|1=1837}} ) – {{ill|Ōkura Kihachirō|en|Ōkura Kihachirō|WD=Q3594034|lt=Ōkura Kihachirō|1=Ōkura Kihachirō}} , businessman {{ill|1928|en|1928|WD=Q19715|lt=1928|1=1928}} ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 26|en|October 26|WD=Q2953|lt=October 26|1=October 26}} , {{ill|1853|en|1853|WD=Q7666|lt=1853|1=1853}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Akitake|en|Tokugawa Akitake|WD=Q3530485|lt=Tokugawa Akitake|1=Tokugawa Akitake}} , last lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|en|Mito Domain|WD=Q1146904|lt=Mito Domain|1=Mito Domain}} (d. {{ill|1910|en|1910|WD=Q2075|lt=1910|1=1910}} ).

{{ill|November 9|en|November 9|WD=Q2991|lt=November 9|1=November 9}} , {{ill|1724|en|1724|WD=Q6926|lt=1724|1=1724}} ) – {{ill|Nishikawa Joken|en|Nishikawa Joken|WD=Q2753679|lt=Nishikawa {{Not to be confused with|September 24|qq=September 24}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 19 of {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 27|en|October 27|WD=Q2956|lt=October 27|1=October 27}} , {{ill|1614|en|1614|WD=Q6781|lt=1614|1=1614}} ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} banishes {{ill|Justo Takayama|en|Justo Takayama|WD=Q749873|lt=Takayama Ukon|1=Justo Takayama}} and 148 {{ill|Kirishitan daimyō|ja|Christian Daimyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kirishitan daimyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to {{ill|Manila|en|Manila|WD=Q1461|lt=Manila|1=Manila}} and {{ill|Macau|en|Macau|WD=Q14773|lt=Macau|1=Macau}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|October 18|en|October 18|WD=Q2964|lt=October 18|1=October 18}} , {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} ) – The {{ill|Daijō-kan|en|Daijō-kan|WD=Q1192939|lt=Daijō-kan|1=Daijō-kan}} issues a decree regarding the statistical reports of prefectural products, which later becomes the basis for {{ill|World Statistics Day|en|World Statistics Day|WD=Q1056713|lt=Statistics Day|1=World Statistics Day}} .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Longde (Later Liang)|ja|龍徳 (五代後梁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Longde (Later Liang)|1=Longde|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11181259}} (Julian calendar {{ill|October 27|en|October 27|WD=Q2956|lt=October 27|1=October 27}} , {{ill|921|en|921|WD=Q30102|lt=921|1=921}} ) – {{ill|Chai Rong|en|Chai Rong|WD=Q1319646|lt=Chai Rong|1=Chai Rong}} , known as 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23|1=October 23}} , {{ill|1837|en|1837|WD=Q7608|lt=1837|1=1837}} ) – {{ill|Ōkura Kihachirō|en|Ōkura Kihachirō|WD=Q3594034|lt=Ōkura Kihachirō|1=Ōkura Kihachirō}} , businessman
